title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Technical Support II Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Technical Support II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 12th or Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included more about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply online befo...
